## What and why

Describe the change and the milestone or issue it belongs to.

## Changes

-

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit title (feat, fix, chore, docs, refactor, test, ci).
- [ ] Types are strict (no `any`; Python typed).
- [ ] Lint and format pass locally.
- [ ] Tests added or updated, covering failure and edge cases.
- [ ] No secrets in the diff; `.env.example` updated if new config was added.
- [ ] No em dashes, no gradients, no fake data.
- [ ] CI is green.
